product: AUTO CDC flows for streaming tables in Databricks SQL are generally available ​
tagline: June 15, 2026 The FLOW AUTO CDC clause for [CREATE STREAMING TABLE](/aws/en/sql/language manual/sql ref syntax ddl create streaming table) in Databricks SQL is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 15, 2026 The FLOW AUTO CDC clause for [CREATE STREAMING TABLE](/aws/en/sql/language manual/sql ref syntax ddl create streaming table) in Databricks SQL is now generally available. Use AUTO CDC to process change data capture (CDC) records from a source into a streaming table, automatically handling out of order records as SCD type 1 or SCD type 2 without the complex logic that MERGE INTO requires.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
